title: ortholoma heterophyllum
intro: Ortholoma heterophyllum, also known as "Kalmegh" or "Amalaki," is a plant species within the family Rutaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ortholoma heterophyllum include its ability to support liver function, boost the immune system, and exhibit antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is commonly used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tablets, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
